title: Hardcore Vampirism
description: Punishes dying with the Vampirism mod much more.
body:
An add-on for the [Vampirism](https://modrinth.com/mod/vampirism) mod that reduces level upon dying. [Werewolves](https://modrinth.com/mod/werewolves) support is included in an alternate file.

Three difficulties are featured, with varying severity upon death. The default difficulty is set to Hard, but can be configured by a server admin. **This is not tied to the server difficulty,** but rather can be changed through running functions, labeled "difficultyeasy", "difficultynormal", and "difficultyhard".

Easy - Level is reduced by 1 on death, including lord level.

Normal - Level is reduced to various milestones on death. 1-4 reduces it to 1, 5-14 reduces it to 4, and lord levels reduce it to 14.

Hard - Revert to human upon death.
